Applying to 00100111
Input
0 0
1 0
2 1
3 0
4 0
5 1
6 1
7 1
Output
0 I1 = 0
1 I2 = 1
2 I3 = 0
3 I4 = 0
4 XOR50 = XOR(1,0) = 1
5 XOR61 = XOR(1,0) = 1
6 XOR72 = XOR(1,1) = 0
7 I3 = 0

\boxed{01001100}
